page.title: Celebrate Marbella Pride 2027 with a Luxury Yacht Charter

data.meta_description: Celebrate Marbella Pride 2027 with a luxury yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Book our fleet for up to 12 guests, all-inclusive from €749/2h.
data.summary: Celebrate Marbella Pride 2027 in style with a private luxury yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Our fleet offers all-inclusive packages for groups up to 12, with free jet ski on select boats.
key_facts: Marbella Pride 2027 dates: late June, exact dates TBC.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and IVA.
Fleet departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h or €2,299/8h.
Tier B Mangusta 80 (white/grey) from €4,719/4h, includes free jet ski.
Larger yachts (Ferretti 94, Canados 86) available on request.
Capacity ranges from 5 to 12 guests per boat.
Marbella Pride events span the Golden Mile, Old Town, and beach clubs.

faq.a: Exact dates for Marbella Pride 2027 are yet to be confirmed, but the event typically takes place in late June. We recommend booking your yacht charter early, as demand is high. Contact us via WhatsApp for the latest updates.

faq.q: Which boats are best for a Marbella Pride charter?
faq.a: For groups up to 9, the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 (€749/2h) are ideal. For up to 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (from €4,719/4h, with free jet ski) or Azimut 58 Flybridge are popular. Larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 (12 pax) are available on request.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. Just bring your swimwear and sunscreen.

faq.q: Can we bring our own decorations for Pride?
faq.a: Yes, absolutely. You are welcome to bring rainbow flags, banners, or decorations to personalise your yacht. Please avoid anything that could damage the upholstery or leave sticky residue. Our crew can help with setup.

faq.q: Do you offer multi-day charters for Pride weekend?
faq.a: We can arrange multi-day charters on request, particularly for larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Canados 86. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss extended itineraries, overnight stays, or custom schedules.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for Pride charters?
faq.a: Our standard cancellation policy applies: full refund if cancelled 14+ days before departure, 50% refund if 7–13 days, and no refund within 7 days. We recommend travel insurance for peace of mind. Exceptions may be made for severe weather.

faq.q: Can we anchor near the Pride beach parties?
faq.a: Many Pride events take place along Marbella's coastline, including beach clubs and the Old Town. Your skipper can anchor near popular spots like Cala del Faro or Cabopino, subject to local regulations and sea conditions.

faq.q: How do we book a yacht for Marbella Pride 2027?
faq.a: Simply contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and budget. We'll confirm availability and send you a secure payment link. Early booking is advised as Pride charters sell out quickly.

data.body_html:
Marbella Pride 2027 is set to be the Costa del Sol's most vibrant celebration of diversity, and there's no better way to join the party than from the deck of a private luxury yacht. Whether you're anchoring near the beach clubs of the Golden Mile or cruising past Puerto Banús with rainbow flags flying, a marbella pride yacht charter 2027 offers an unforgettable blend of freedom, glamour, and inclusivity. Our all-inclusive packages start from €749 for two hours, with licensed skippers, drinks, snacks, and fuel included.

Why Choose a Yacht for Marbella Pride 2027?

Pride in Marbella is as much about the coastline as the parade. With a private charter, you skip the crowded beach clubs and enjoy your own floating VIP lounge. You can anchor at Cala del Faro for a swim, cruise past the iconic La Concha mountain backdrop, or moor near the Old Town for the evening festivities. Our fleet departs from Puerto Banús, putting you minutes from the action. Plus, with a dedicated skipper and crew, you're free to celebrate without worrying about logistics.

Our Fleet for Pride 2027

We offer a range of yachts suitable for intimate groups or larger parties. All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%).

BoatLengthMax GuestsPrice From
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h

Ferretti 9429m12On request

For larger groups or bespoke itineraries, contact us via WhatsApp. Our team will help you select the perfect vessel for your Pride celebration.

Marbella Pride 2027: What to Expect

Marbella Pride typically spans a long weekend in late June, featuring a parade through the Old Town, drag shows, DJ sets, and beach parties. The main stage is often set near the Golden Mile, with many events spilling onto the sand. A yacht charter in Marbella gives you front-row views of the coastline action, plus the flexibility to retreat to quieter coves like Cala Cortés when you need a break. Expect temperatures around 28°C and sea breezes perfect for sundowners.

How to Personalise Your Pride Charter

Bring your own rainbow decorations, custom playlist, or even a drag performer for a private show (subject to crew approval). Our boats are fully equipped with sound systems and shaded decks. For a truly memorable day, consider the Mangusta 80, which includes a free jet ski – ideal for towing a Pride flag across the bay. We also recommend booking a sunset slot (7–9 PM) to catch the sky turning gold over La Concha.

Booking Your Marbella Pride Yacht Charter 2027

Demand for Pride charters is high – early booking is essential. Simply send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send a secure payment link. All prices include VAT and all listed inclusions. For the best rates, book before May 2027. Explore our full boat rental Marbella options for more inspiration.

Other Events to Combine with Pride

If you're travelling to Marbella for Pride, consider extending your stay to enjoy the city's summer calendar. From the Starlite Festival in August to the Marbella International Film Festival, there's always something happening. A marbella pride yacht charter 2027 can be paired with a day trip to Estepona or Sotogrande – your skipper will tailor the route.

Frequently Asked Questions

When is Marbella Pride 2027?

Exact dates for Marbella Pride 2027 are yet to be confirmed, but the event typically takes place in late June. We recommend booking your yacht charter early, as demand is high. Contact us via WhatsApp for the latest updates.

Which boats are best for a Marbella Pride charter?

For groups up to 9, the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 (€749/2h) are ideal. For up to 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (from €4,719/4h, with free jet ski) or Azimut 58 Flybridge are popular. Larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 (12 pax) are available on request.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. Just bring your swimwear and sunscreen.

Can we bring our own decorations for Pride?

Yes, absolutely. You are welcome to bring rainbow flags, banners, or decorations to personalise your yacht. Please avoid anything that could damage the upholstery or leave sticky residue. Our crew can help with setup.

Do you offer multi-day charters for Pride weekend?

We can arrange multi-day charters on request, particularly for larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Canados 86. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss extended itineraries, overnight stays, or custom schedules.

What is the cancellation policy for Pride charters?

Our standard cancellation policy applies: full refund if cancelled 14+ days before departure, 50% refund if 7–13 days, and no refund within 7 days. We recommend travel insurance for peace of mind. Exceptions may be made for severe weather.

Can we anchor near the Pride beach parties?

Many Pride events take place along Marbella's coastline, including beach clubs and the Old Town. Your skipper can anchor near popular spots like Cala del Faro or Cabopino, subject to local regulations and sea conditions.

How do we book a yacht for Marbella Pride 2027?

Simply contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and budget. We'll confirm availability and send you a secure payment link. Early booking is advised as Pride charters sell out quickly.

Ready to celebrate Marbella Pride 2027 from the water? Browse our full fleet and learn more about Pride charters on our blog. For immediate assistance, send us a WhatsApp message – we'll help you plan the ultimate Pride experience.
